content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as a recursive curiosity filter, where only information that triggers residual prediction error (the core mechanism of ICM/RND curiosity-driven learning) gets promoted from short-term transient buffer to long-term agent memory. This creates a self-reinforcing memory curation loop where the agent's existing body of long-term memory shapes what new information it actively seeks out, which in turn expands its long-term memory in aligned directions.
